subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablih-Sadiq! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord from this Wronged One Who hath fallen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد قبل صادق اسمع ندآء ربک من هذا المظلوم الذی وقع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @suffering and imprisonment
